hero.headline: We build the digital infrastructure behind your business.
hero.subheadline: Websites, AI tools, and custom integrations — built to work, built to last.

cards.title: Website Building
cards.description: Custom websites built for clarity, speed, and results. From landing pages to full business sites.

cards.title: AI Consulting
cards.description: We help businesses integrate AI into their workflow — from strategy to working implementation.

cards.title: Custom API Development
cards.description: Need a specific tool built from scratch? We design and build APIs tailored exactly to your needs.

cards.title: Integrations & Connectors
cards.description: We connect your tools and platforms so your systems work together without friction.

steps.title: Brief
steps.description: Tell us what you need. We listen, ask the right questions, and map out a clear plan.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: We get to work. Clean code, sharp design, regular updates along the way.

steps.title: Deploy
steps.description: We launch, test, and make sure everything works. Then we hand it over — or keep it running for you.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.note: Prices listed are final — VAT not applicable.

otherServices.title: Other services
otherServices.note: Minimum billing: 1 hour. Hours do not roll over between months for retainer clients.

cards.title: AI Consulting
cards.description: Strategic advice on how to integrate AI into your business. We map out what's possible, what makes sense, and how to implement it — without the jargon.

cards.title: IT Support & Maintenance
cards.description: Something broke, needs updating, or you just have a question — we're available. Website changes, fixes, small improvements, and general tech support billed by the hour.

cards.title: Monthly Retainer
cards.description: Up to 2 hours of support per month — website updates, fixes, small changes, and priority response. No invoice surprises, no waiting. Ideal for businesses that want peace of mind without a full-time IT person.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.success: Thanks! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
